site.title: Zen Root
site.description: Find your center. A mindful space for clarity and calm.

home.subtitle: A mindful space designed for clarity, calm, and focus in a noisy world.

about.title: About Zen Root
about.description: Zen Root is a mindful digital space crafted for those seeking clarity and calm. We believe technology should help you focus, not distract.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To create digital experiences that promote mindfulness and well-being.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.text: Less noise, more signal. Every element is designed with intention, every interaction crafted with care.

radio.description: Curated ambient and focus radio streams to help you stay in the zone.

launcher.description: A minimal, distraction-free launcher designed to bring calm to your home screen.

A calm, productive new tab — weather, email, notes, ambient sounds, and more in one beautiful space. Zen Launcher turns every new tab into a moment of clarity. Instead of a blank page or a wall of bookmarks, you get a quiet dashboard that brings together the things you actually reach for — without making any of them fight for attention.

radio.description: Zen Radio streams curated ambient and focus music to help you stay in the zone — lofi, nature sounds, and more, playing quietly in any browser.
